hand.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

Adjust every stock by +1 or -1 (choose per stock)

hand.name: Tip-Off
hand.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

hand.name: Scout
hand.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

hand.name: Tip-Off
hand.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

hand.name: Boom
hand.ability: When bought, Yellow rises an extra +1 (Yellow rises +2 total).

hand.name: Scout
hand.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

hand.name: Informant
hand.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

market.name: Scout
market.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

market.name: Informant
market.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

market.name: Wild Share
market.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

mainDeck.name: Rumor Mill
mainDeck.description: Adjust every stock by +1 or -1 (choose per stock)

mainDeck.name: Informant
mainDeck.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

mainDeck.name: Wild Share
mainDeck.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

mainDeck.name: Inside Track
mainDeck.description: Look at the top 2 Insider Tip cards and return them in any order

mainDeck.name: Preferred Bidder
mainDeck.description: For rest of game, when you tie the winning bid, you win

mainDeck.name: Wild Share
mainDeck.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

mainDeck.name: Stock Certificate Forgery
mainDeck.description: Claim any one goal using one fewer stock than required

discardPile.name: Corner the Market
discardPile.description: Take any one face-up market stock for free (not bought: no price move, no ability)

discardPile.name: Boom
discardPile.ability: When bought, Purple rises an extra +1 (Purple rises +2 total).

discardPile.name: Wild Share
discardPile.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

discardPile.name: Wiretap
discardPile.description: Look at the top 2 Insider Tip cards and return them in any order

discardPile.name: Boom
discardPile.ability: When bought, Blue rises an extra +1 (Blue rises +2 total).

discardPile.name: Boom
discardPile.ability: When bought, Orange rises an extra +1 (Orange rises +2 total).

discardPile.name: Wild Speculation
discardPile.description: Reveal the top main-deck card and put it on the bottom; if it is a colored stock, raise or lower that color by 3 (your choice). If it has no color, reveal again

discardPile.name: Tip-Off
discardPile.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

discardPile.name: The Squeeze
discardPile.description: Raise one stock by +2 OR lower one stock by -2

discardPile.name: Hostile Takeover
discardPile.description: Look at another player's hand and take 1 stock of your choice. They receive $6 from the bank

discardPile.name: Tipster's Choice
discardPile.description: Draw 2 cards from the main deck, keep 1, return the other to the bottom

discardPile.name: Tip-Off
discardPile.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

discardPile.name: Pump and Dump
discardPile.description: Sell 1 stock at double its current price (still a sale: that color falls -1)

discardPile.name: Scout
discardPile.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

resolvedInsiderTips.text: Yellow stock value is halved (round down)
Purple stock value is halved (round down)

log: Game initialized with 3 players: 42 cards in main deck, 5 in market, 6 Insider Tips, 5 goals.

T1 Astor: auctioned stock-29 Purple Boom, won it himself for $7 (cash 30->23). Purple +2 to $6. Market refilled with action-38 Corner the Market. Die: 6 -> all stocks +1 (Blue/Orange/Yellow $5, Purple $7).
T2 Getty: auctioned action-38 Corner the Market. Astor won it for $6 (cash 23->17). Action card, no price move. Market refilled with stock-26 Purple blank. Die: 5 -> nothing.

T3 free actions: Astor played Corner the Market to take stock-25 Purple blank free (now 2 Purple), then claimed goal-67 (2 Purple, reward: peeked top 2 tips = Yellow crash, Purple crash). 4 goals remain.

T3 Morgan: auctioned stock-5 Blue Boom, won it herself for $5 (cash 30->25). Blue +2 to $7. Market refilled with action-41 Wild Speculation. Die: 1 -> flipped itip-53 Yellow crash: Yellow halved 5->2. Insider Tip deck: 5 left.

T4 Astor: auctioned stock-27 Purple blank, won it for $8 (cash 17->9). Purple +1 to $8. Now holds 3 Purple. Claimed goal-71 (reward adjust-all: Blue-1, Orange+1, Yellow+1, Purple+1 -> Blue 6, Orange 6, Yellow 3, Purple 9). 3 goals remain. Market refilled stock-7 Blue Scout. Die: 2 -> nothing.

T5 Getty: auctioned stock-7 Blue Scout. Morgan won it for $6 (cash 25->19). Blue +1 to $7. Morgan now holds 2 Blue; Scout peek revealed top tip = Purple crash (Morgan knows). Market refilled stock-13 Orange Boom. Die: 3 -> nothing.

T6 Morgan: auctioned stock-13 Orange Boom, won it herself for $7 (cash 19->12). Orange +2 to $8. Morgan now holds 2 Blue + 1 Orange (needs 1 more Orange for goal-72). Market refilled stock-33 Wild Share. Die: 3 -> nothing.

T7 Astor: SOLD stock-29 Purple Boom for $9 (cash 9->18), Purple -1 to $8. Astor now holds 2 Purple, cashing out ahead of the Purple crash he foresees. Die: 6 -> all stocks +1 (Blue 8, Orange 9, Yellow 4, Purple 9).

T8 Getty: auctioned stock-33 Wild Share. Morgan won it for $1 (cash 12->11). Morgan claimed goal-72 (2B+2O via Wild Share as 2nd Orange): gained $6 (cash 11->17), Wild Share discarded. 2 goals remain (goal-73, goal-70) -- next claim ends the game. Market refilled stock-22 Yellow Tip-Off. Die: 4 -> nothing.

T9 Morgan: auctioned stock-22 Yellow Tip-Off. Astor won it for $7 (cash 18->11) to deny Morgan's goal-73 path. Yellow +1 to $5; Tip-Off raised Purple +1 to $10. Astor now holds 2 Purple + 1 Yellow. Market refilled action-47 Wiretap. Die: 6 -> all stocks +1 (Blue 9, Orange 10, Yellow 6, Purple 10 clamped).

T10 Astor: auctioned action-47 Wiretap, won it for $8 (cash 11->3). Then played Wiretap free: peeked top 2 tips (Purple crash, Black Monday) and reordered -> Black Monday now on top, Purple crash position 2. Wiretap discarded. Market refilled stock-2 Blue blank. Die: 3 -> nothing.

T11 Getty: auctioned action-41 Wild Speculation. ALL players passed (incl. auctioneer) -> no sale, card stays in market. Getty's turn effectively wasted. Die: 6 -> all stocks +1 (Blue 10, Orange 10, Yellow 7, Purple 10; Orange & Purple clamped).

T12 Morgan: SOLD stock-5 Blue Boom for $10 (cash 17->27), Blue -1 to $9. Banking cash vs crash cards; now holds 1 Blue + 1 Orange. Die: 6 -> all stocks +1 (Blue 10, Orange 10, Yellow 8, Purple 10; clamped).

T13 Astor: SOLD a Purple blank (stock-25) for $10 (cash 3->13), Purple -1 to $9. Now holds 1 Purple + 1 Yellow. Die: 1 -> flipped itip-63 Black Monday: all stocks -2 (Blue 8, Orange 8, Yellow 6, Purple 7). Insider Tip deck: 4 left.

T14 Getty: auctioned stock-4 Blue blank. Getty passed his own auction; Morgan won it for $1 (cash 27->26). Blue +1 to $9. Morgan now holds 2 Blue + 1 Orange. Market refilled stock-30 Purple Tip-Off. Die: 4 -> nothing.
T15 Morgan: SOLD stock-13 Orange Boom for $8 (cash 26->34), Orange -1 to $7. Now holds 2 Blue. Die: 1 -> flipped itip-55 Purple crash: Purple halved 7->3. Insider Tip deck: 3 left.
T16 Astor: SOLD stock-27 Purple blank for $3 (cash 13->16), Purple -1 to $2. Now holds 1 Yellow only. Die: 5 -> nothing.

RULE CHANGE (mid-game, applies from T17): (a) auctioneer sets an initial price ($0+) and a card is always sold; (b) stock prices no longer cap at $10 (floor $0 only). Earlier turns not retroactively fixed.

T17 Getty: auctioned stock-26 Purple blank at initial price $2. Morgan and Astor passed -> Getty won at $2 (cash 30->28). Purple +1 to $3. Getty now holds 1 Purple. Market refilled stock-12 Orange blank. Die: 3 -> nothing.

T18 Morgan: auctioned stock-2 Blue blank at initial price $0. Bidding: Astor $2, Getty $4, Morgan passed, Astor passed -> Getty won at $4 (cash 28->24). Blue +1 to $10. Getty now holds 1 Purple + 1 Blue. Market refilled stock-32 Purple Informant. Die: 2 -> nothing.

T19 Astor: auctioned action-41 Wild Speculation at initial price $0. Getty and Morgan passed -> Astor won it free. Astor holds Wild Speculation (can play it free later). Market refilled stock-6 Blue Tip-Off. Die: 2 -> nothing.

T20 free action: Astor played Wild Speculation. Revealed main-deck cards top-down: Inside Track, Preferred Bidder, Wild Share (all colorless, skipped), then stock-18 Yellow -> Astor chose +3 on Yellow (6->9). The 4 revealed cards moved to deck bottom. Wild Speculation discarded.
T20 Getty: SOLD stock-2 Blue blank for $10 (cash 24->34), Blue -1 to $9. Now holds 1 Purple. Die: 5 -> nothing.

T21 Morgan: auctioned stock-30 Purple Tip-Off at initial price $0. Bidding: Astor $2, Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $2 (cash 16->14). Purple +1 to $4; Tip-Off raised Yellow +1 to $10. Astor now holds 1 Yellow + 1 Purple. Market refilled stock-31 Purple Scout. Die: 5 -> nothing.
T22 Astor: SOLD stock-22 Yellow Tip-Off for $10 (cash 14->24), Yellow -1 to $9. Now holds 1 Purple only. Die: 4 -> nothing.

T23 Getty: auctioned stock-6 Blue Tip-Off at initial $0. Morgan and Astor passed -> Getty won at $0. Blue +1 to 10; Tip-Off raised Purple +1 to 5. Getty holds 1 Purple + 1 Blue. Market refilled stock-17 Yellow blank. Die: 5 -> nothing.

T24 Morgan: auctioned stock-17 Yellow blank at initial $0. Bidding: Astor $1, Getty $10, Morgan passed, Astor passed -> Getty won at $10 (cash 34->24). Yellow +1 to 10. Getty now holds 1 Purple + 1 Blue + 1 Yellow. Market refilled action-37 Tipsters Choice. Die: 4 -> nothing.

T25 Astor: auctioned action-37 Tipsters Choice at initial $1. Getty and Morgan passed -> Astor won at $1 (cash 24->23). Astor holds Tipsters Choice. Market refilled action-40 The Squeeze. Die: 1 -> flipped itip-62 Black Monday: all stocks -2 (Blue 8, Orange 5, Yellow 8, Purple 3). Insider Tip deck: 2 left.

T26 Getty: auctioned action-40 The Squeeze at initial $0. Bidding: Morgan $4, Astor passed, Getty passed -> Morgan won at $4 (cash 34->30). Morgan holds The Squeeze. Market refilled action-44 Hostile Takeover. Die: 6 -> all stocks +1 (Blue 9, Orange 6, Yellow 9, Purple 4).
T27 free action: Morgan played The Squeeze -> lowered Yellow -2 to 7 (hurts Getty 1 Yellow). The Squeeze discarded.

T27 Morgan: auctioned action-44 Hostile Takeover at initial $0. Bidding: Astor $8, Getty $9, Morgan $10, Astor pass, Getty $11, Morgan pass -> Getty won at $11 (cash 24->13). Getty holds Hostile Takeover. Market refilled stock-15 Orange Scout. Die: 4 -> nothing.

T28 free action: Getty played Hostile Takeover -> stole stock-7 Blue Scout from Morgan (no price move, no ability). Morgan got $6 (cash 30->36). Getty now holds 2 Blue + 1 Yellow + 1 Purple; Morgan holds 1 Blue. Hostile Takeover discarded.

T28 Astor: auctioned stock-31 Purple Scout at initial $0. Getty and Morgan passed -> Astor won at $0. Purple +1 to 5. Scout peek: Astor saw top tip = Yellow +4 surge. Astor holds 2 Purple + Tipsters Choice. Market refilled stock-16 Orange Informant. Die: 6 -> all stocks +1 (Blue 10, Orange 7, Yellow 8, Purple 6).

T29 Getty: auctioned stock-12 Orange blank at initial $0. Bidding: Morgan $1, Astor $2, Getty pass, Morgan pass -> Astor won at $2 (cash 23->21). Orange +1 to 8. Astor holds 2 Purple + 1 Orange + Tipsters Choice. Market refilled stock-19 Yellow blank. Die: 6 -> all stocks +1 (Blue 11, Orange 9, Yellow 9, Purple 7).

T30 Morgan: auctioned stock-19 Yellow blank at initial $8 to keep it from Getty. Bidding: Astor $21, Getty passed (loan math made winning a loss), Morgan passed -> Astor won at $21 (cash 21->0), overpaying $11 for a $10 stock to deny Getty goal-73. Yellow +1 to 10. Astor holds 2 Purple+1 Orange+1 Yellow+Tipsters Choice. Market refilled stock-10 Orange blank. Die: 5 -> nothing.

T31 free action: Astor played Tipsters Choice -> drew stock-8 Blue Informant and action-43 Stock Cert Forgery; kept stock-8 (free Blue stock, +~$11 wealth), action-43 to deck bottom. Tipsters Choice discarded. Astor now holds 1 Blue+1 Yellow+1 Orange+2 Purple.

T31 Astor: SOLD stock-30 Purple Tip-Off for $7 (cash 0->7), Purple -1 to 6. Die: 1 -> flipped itip-58 Yellow surge: Yellow +4 (10->14). Insider Tip deck: 1 left (one double-surge card; the next roll of 1 ends the game).

T32 Getty: auctioned stock-10 Orange blank at initial $8. Morgan and Astor passed -> Getty won at $8 (cash 13->5). Orange +1 to 10. Getty holds 2 Blue+1 Yellow+1 Purple+1 Orange. Market refilled action-39 Pump and Dump. Die: 4 -> nothing.

T33 Morgan: auctioned action-39 Pump and Dump at initial $0. Bidding: Astor $7, Getty $8, Morgan $9, Astor pass, Getty pass -> Morgan won at $9 (cash 36->27). Then played Pump and Dump (free, before her roll): sold stock-4 Blue at DOUBLE = $22 (cash 27->49), Blue -1 to 10. Morgan now holds 0 stocks, $49 all-cash. Market refilled stock-9 Orange.
T33 Morgan die roll: 3 -> nothing

T34 Astor: auctioned stock-9 Orange blank at initial $0. Getty passed, Morgan $4, Astor passed -> Morgan won at $4 (cash 49->45). Orange +1 to 11. Morgan holds 1 Orange. Market refilled stock-20 Yellow blank. Die: 5 -> nothing.

T35 Getty: auctioned stock-20 Yellow blank at initial $0. Bidding: Morgan $18 (to deny Getty goal-73), Astor pass, Getty pass (loan math made winning a loss) -> Morgan won at $18 (cash 45->27), overpaying ~$3. Yellow +1 to 15. Morgan holds 1 Orange + 1 Yellow. Market refilled stock-23 Yellow Scout. Die: 3 -> nothing.

T36 Morgan: auctioned stock-23 Yellow Scout at initial $0. Bidding: Astor $8, Getty $16, Morgan $23, Astor passed, Getty passed -> Morgan won at $23 (cash 27->4). Yellow +1 to 16. Scout peek: Morgan saw top tip = itip-61 Double Surge (Yellow+3/Purple+3). Morgan now holds 2 Yellow + 1 Orange. Market refilled with stock-3.
T36 Morgan die roll: 6 -> all stocks +1.
T37 Astor: SOLD stock-12 Orange blank for $12 (cash 7->19), Orange -1 to 11. Astor now holds 1 Blue + 1 Yellow + 1 Purple.
T37 Astor die roll: 6 -> all stocks +1.

T38 Getty: auctioned stock-3 Blue blank at initial $0. Bidding: Morgan passed, Astor $1, Getty $2, Astor $3, Getty passed -> Astor won at $3 (cash 19->16). Blue +1 to 13. Astor now holds 2 Blue + 1 Yellow + 1 Purple. Market refilled with stock-34 Wild Share.
T38 Getty die roll: 5 -> nothing.

T39 Morgan: auctioned stock-14 Orange Tip-Off at initial $0. Bidding: Astor passed, Getty $6, Morgan passed -> Getty won at $6 (cash 5->9 after 1 loan). Orange +1 to 13 (buy); Tip-Off raised Blue +1 to 14. Getty now holds 2 Blue + 1 Yellow + 2 Orange + 1 Purple, 1 loan. Market refilled with stock-21 Yellow Boom.
T39 Getty die roll: 3 -> nothing.

T40 Morgan: auctioned stock-32 Purple Informant at initial $0. Astor and Getty passed -> Morgan won at $0. Purple +1 to 9. Morgan now holds 1 Orange + 2 Yellow + 1 Purple. Market refilled with stock-11 Orange blank.
T40 Morgan die roll: 2 -> nothing.
T41 Astor: SOLD stock-31 Purple Scout for $9 (cash 16->25), Purple -1 to 8. Astor now holds 2 Blue + 1 Yellow.
T41 Astor die roll: 4 -> nothing.

T42 Getty: auctioned stock-21 Yellow Boom at initial $18. Bidding: Morgan passed, Astor $19, Getty $20, Astor passed -> Getty won at $20 (cash 9->9 after 2 loans, total 3 loans). Yellow +2 to 20 (buy +1, Boom +1). Getty now holds 2 Blue + 2 Yellow + 2 Orange + 1 Purple -> qualifies for goal-73. Market refilled with stock-1 Blue blank.
T42 free action: Getty claimed goal-73 (2 Blue + 2 Yellow). Reward: raised Orange +3 to 16. Only goal-70 remains in play -> GAME ENDS.
FINAL: 1. Getty $81 | 2. Astor $73 | 3. Morgan $68
